name: chain_14_ph_launches_today__high_quality_b2b_
method: 14 PH launches today - HIGH quality B2B leads. 48h outreach window. Cold email: congrats on launch + offer beta access. File: leads/producthunt_b2b_leads.csv

stages.task: Scrape today's PH launches via API + playwright fallback. Extract: product name, tagline, maker names, maker Twitter/LinkedIn, website URL, upvote count, category tags

Filter B2B only (reject consumer/game/social). Score by: upvote velocity, team size signals, pricing page presence, SaaS indicators. Extract founder email via website contact page + Hunter.io free tier + GitHub profile mining

Generate personalized cold email per lead using template: congrats on launch + specific product compliment + relevant offer (beta access to our tool OR free audit of their landing page/SEO). Use claude -p for personalization. Subject line A/B variants.
Queue emails in outreach pipeline. Log to LEDGER/OUTREACH_PIPELINE.csv with send_date, follow_up_date (48h), status. Respect warmup limits from WARMUP_DEVICE_MATRIX.
